mapper.sql: SELECT id, name, department, phone_total, sort, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark FROM dev_employee WHERE del_flag = '0'
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(phone_total), 0) FROM dev_employee WHERE del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dev_employee (name, department, phone_total, sort, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark) VALUES (#{name}, #{department}, #{phoneTotal}, #{sort}, '0', #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{remark})
mapper.update: UPDATE dev_employee SET del_flag = '2' WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dev_daily_report WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dev_daily_check WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId}
mapper.update: UPDATE dev_employee SET phone_total = GREATEST(phone_total + #{delta}, 0) WHERE id = #{id}
